35. the three weeks that had been commanded me. So far only two fasts of seven days have been mentioned, viz. one before the second vision and another here before the third. The author evidently is thinking of another before Vision I, which in the present form of the text is not mentioned, but doubtless was there originally. The three successive weeks of fasting culminate in the most important…

5 of the Persians. “λα thus was the house finished | Darius the king. by the three and twentieth day of the month

matches.lb: Second Temple: The Midrash of Philo 8:4:1
matches.x: Why does he say, "The ark settled in the seventh month on the seven and twentieth day of the month?" (Genesis 8:4).

When the light had departed, I had no strength. The Prophet Joseph Smith had been transfigured that he might endure the presence of God. The Spirit of God had overshadowed him, causing a divine transformation in his body. Physical exhaustion is a natural attendant to such an experience. "I was left alone, and saw this great vision, and there remained no strength in me," Daniel recounted, "for my…
